mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, item_id, content, message_type, send_time, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{itemId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{sendTime}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE (sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{senderId}) ORDER BY send_time ASC

SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND ((sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{senderId})) ORDER BY send_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
